title: dichanthelium commutatum subsp. equilaterale
intro: Dichanthelium commutatum subsp. equilaterale, commonly known as bent grass or dichanthelium, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of dichanthelium include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support respiratory health. Dichanthelium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible medicinal plant.
